price: Unser Herr, nimm die Strafe von uns hinweg; wir sind (jetzt) ja gläubig.
arabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكۡشِفۡ عَنَّا ٱلۡعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤۡمِنُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: rabbanā ik'shif ʿannā al-ʿadhāba innā mu'minūna
